sans.$value: 'Arial', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'
sans.$description: Default sans-serif font stack. Brands override this (e.g., Sprig uses Gotham, Microbird uses Geist).

display.$description: Display/heading font stack. Defaults to sans. Brands override for distinct heading typography (e.g., Microbird uses Big Shoulders Text).

mono.$value: 'Courier New', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
mono.$description: Monospace font stack for data display. Brands override (e.g., Microbird uses Geist Mono).

size.$description: Font size scale. Referenced by semantic typography tokens (typo-heading-1, typo-base, etc.).

leading.$description: Line-height scale. Named for relative tightness rather than numeric value.
